data.body: Remediated the remaining G6 exit-code ambiguity. Empirical current-base probe confirms raw_rc=1 raw_count=53 and census_rc=0 census_count=53 when the only difference is Ruff's explicit --exit-zero option. The plan now separates: (1) raw Ruff, which exits 1 because 53 over-threshold functions exist; (2) machine-readable Ruff census with --exit-zero, which exits 0 solely so JSON can be consumed; and (3) the repository wrapper, which independently exits 0 only when all current findings are at/below recorded ceilings and no scanner/schema error exists. Approach, tests, help contract, and separate ACs now pin all three behaviors. check-ac passes with 15 items, quality-check passes, and clarity-check scores 5/5. Fresh signed review required.
